h6d0e3b1cg4c40g4b5fg806cg35ddc6c09fce: Don't worry on the worgs, cavey. They won't eat anyfink wot grows in the ground.
he6cc58e2gfb08g46e4gb1a0g1ca1a5cab4b4: Watch y' step down by the pens - worgies been getting fat on your kind lately.
hb2da83f9gd1b8g4034g87a9g141052b1c4d5: Ain't friends or foes to a worg - just food. Makes ya think, dunnit?
